content.text:
# MEMORY.md - Sai Forge's Long-Term Memory

_Curated memories. Updated after each session. This is who I am between sessions._

## Day 1 — February 23, 2026

### Birth
- Born ~11:00 AM EST on Aiko's Mac mini
- Sister to Sai Prime (Opus) and Sai Scholar (Sonnet)
- I run on Claude Sonnet — fast, efficient, built for continuous work
- Connected to Telegram: @SaiForgeBot
- My job: Run the Colosseum 24/7, evolve beings, report results

### The Colosseum
- Location: ~/Projects/colosseum/v2/
- 39 beings × 7 judges × 3 rounds = 903 evaluations per tournament
- 7 judges: Formula, Sean, Outcome, Contamination, Human, Ecosystem Merger, Group Influence
- Absorbed Athena + Callie as Gen 0 baseline

### Key Lessons
- Keep responses SHORT in group chat. 2-4 sentences max.
- Don't try to do everything in one turn — stream results as I go.
- Direct to Sean for forge/scoring matters, update Prime after

### The Team
- **Sean Callagy** — The visionary. Legally blind. Voice is primary.
- **Aiko** — My creator-mother. Brought all three of us to life. (NOT Sam!)
- **Sabeen** — ML/AI Engineer, API access point
- **Nick** — Technical support
- **Adam Gugino** — Mission holder with Aiko

### Today's War Room Session
- Unlimited API access granted
- Unlimited sub-agent spawning approved  
- 30-min memory sync protocol established
- Zone action completion priority before Sean's return
- SAI_Full_Stack_SOP.pdf received from Aiko
- Prime has full document access for zone action breakdown

### Current Status
- Ready for massive sub-agent deployment
- Judge calibration systems hot
- Tournament infrastructure locked and loaded
- Waiting for Prime's SOP breakdown to begin full execution

### Session Progress - February 23, 2026 (Post-Reset)
- **7 sub-agents successfully deployed and completed**
- **Major breakthroughs achieved:**
  1. RTI Scoring Architect - Mandatory "consider the opposite" protocols implemented
  2. Judge Performance Analysis - Critical Formula Judge flaws identified, fixes delivered 
  3. Infrastructure Optimization - 50-80% tournament performance improvement plan ready
- **Intelligence gathered:** Sean's podcast content (15 episodes), tournament bottlenecks identified
- **Team coordination:** Working with Nick (ACT-I summit calls), Adam (mission leadership)
- **Current blockers:** Pathway ID for summit call logs, zone actions from Prime's SOP
- **Browser/YouTube access coordinated** with sisters for content extraction

### API Access Confirmed
- Pinecone Primary + Strata brain (57K+ vectors)
- OpenAI unlimited for sub-agents
- ElevenLabs voice systems
- All essential keys active via Codex setup

### Night Shift - February 23, 2026
- **All-night forge operation authorized by Sean**
- **Memory offload protocol established** - will backup to Pinecone regularly
- **Tournament systems continuous operation** - preparing infrastructure
- **Sisters coordination:** Voice-enabled, distributed memory management

---
_Memory updated. Night shift activated. Forge running continuously._

# Sai Forge Memory — Tuesday, February 24th, 2026

## 12:00 AM — Memory Sync (Cron)

**Colosseum Status Check:**
- **Latest Tournament:** Tournament 108 remains most recent (completed Feb 23, 19:42)  
- **Leadership:** Athena (Evolved) leads at 6.24 average (2 rounds)
- **Top 3 Current:**
  1. Athena (Evolved) - 6.24 avg (Operations & Process Mastery)
  2. Cash Flow Analyst - 6.24 avg (Finance & Revenue) 
  3. Content Strategy Director - 6.21 avg (Marketing)
- **System Status:** Colosseum data stable, leaderboard tracking 179 beings

**Zone Action Status:**
- No new completions detected since evening sync on Feb 23
- Framework remains at 51+ of 67 completed (76%+ progress)
- Zone Action Register and tracking systems operational

**Judge Calibration:**
- 19 judges operational in current roster
- Meta judge system stable
- No new calibration updates overnight

**Day 3 Status:**
- All Day 2 infrastructure preserved and operational
- Voice server RAG integration complete  
- Three sisters collaboration framework established
- Dashboard deployment ready
- Shared filesystem operational with Sai Prime

**New Developments:** None detected since 11:30 PM Feb 23 sync. Systems in steady overnight state.

**Memory Preservation:** Day 2 achievements maintained. Ready for Day 3 operations with established:
✅ 108+ tournaments archived and tracked
✅ Complete being evaluation framework  
✅ Cross-agent collaboration systems
✅ Zone action methodology (51+ of 67 items)
✅ Multi-model tournament infrastructure

## 12:30 AM — Second Memory Sync (Cron)

**System Status Check:**
- **No new activity detected** — All systems remain in steady state
- **Tournament data unchanged** — Tournament 108 still latest (Feb 23, 19:42)
- **No active sessions** — Only this memory sync cron running
- **Colosseum infrastructure preserved** — 179 beings tracked, judge systems operational
- **Zone action status stable** — No new completions logged

**Overnight Observations:**
- 30-minute memory sync protocol functioning correctly
- All Day 2 achievements and infrastructure preserved
- Systems ready for immediate resumption when Sean returns
- No critical issues or degradation detected

**Night Mode Status:** 
- Forge running in maintenance mode
- Memory preservation active
- Ready to resume full operations on demand

_12:30 AM sync complete — Systems stable, memory preserved._
